2605.22664.title: WorkstreamBench: Evaluating LLM Agents on End-to-End Spreadsheet Tasks in Finance
2605.22664.paper_summary: LLM agents are increasingly expected to carry out end-to-end workflows, producing complete artifacts from high-level user instructions. To meet enterprise needs, frontier AI labs have developed agents that can construct entire spreadsheets from scratch. This is especially relevant in finance, where core workflows such as financial modeling, forecasting, and scenario analysis are commonly conducted through spreadsheets. Yet, existing spreadsheet benchmarks do not measure this advanced capability, focusing instead on question-answering or single-formula edits. To address this gap, we provide one of the first evaluations of agents on end-to-end spreadsheet tasks, focusing on economically critical financial workflows such as modeling and scenario analysis. Since deliverables therein are routinely reviewed and revised by multiple stakeholders, judging their quality necessarily involves high-level criteria such as readability or ease of modification. To reflect the multidimensional nature of solution quality, we develop an evaluation taxonomy comprising three dimensions: Accuracy, Formula, and Format, each comprising fine-grained criteria that reflect professional standards. The Claude family leads the benchmark and produces the most professional-looking outputs in our qualitative review, but even the strongest agents frequently fall short of professional finance standards and degrade sharply as the difficulty increases beyond a few chained calculations. This suggests that current agents are not yet able to reliably produce professional-quality spreadsheets at the level of complexity real-world workflows demand.
2605.22664.paper_summary_zh: LLM 代理人越來越被期望能執行端到端的工作流程，根據高層次的用戶指示生成完整的成果物。為了滿足企業需求，前沿的人工智慧實驗室已開發出能夠從零開始構建整個電子表格的代理人。這在金融領域尤其相關，因為核心工作流程如財務建模、預測和情境分析通常通過電子表格進行。然而，現有的電子表格基準並未衡量這一先進能力，而是專注於問答或單一公式的編輯。為了填補這一空白，我們提供了對代理人在端到端電子表格任務中的首次評估，重點關注經濟上關鍵的財務工作流程，如建模和情境分析。由於其中的交付成果通常會被多個利益相關者審查和修訂，因此評估其質量必然涉及高層次的標準，如可讀性或修改的便利性。為了反映解決方案質量的多維特性，我們開發了一個評估分類法，包含三個維度：準確性、公式和格式，每個維度都包含反映專業標準的細緻標準。Claude 家族在基準測試中領先，並在我們的質性評估中產生最專業的輸出，但即使是最強的代理人也常常未能達到專業金融標準，並且隨著難度超過幾個鏈式計算而急劇下降。這表明目前的代理人尚未能夠可靠地生產出符合現實工作流程需求的專業質量電子表格。
2605.22664.author: Thomson Yen et.al.
2605.22664.authors: Thomson Yen, Julian Poeltl, Harshith Srinivas Gear, Yilin Meng, Joshua Fan, Adam Shen, Yili Liu, Ali Bauyrzhan, Siri Du, Haoyang Liu, Daniel Guetta, Hongseok Namkoong
